entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL INFORMATION SYSTEM
entities.description: A system used for the adaptation of crops in varied agroenvironments

entities.name: CROP
entities.description: A plant grown for food or other use, whose adaptation is influenced by various factors

entities.name: CULTIVAR
entities.description: A cultivated variety of a plant

entities.name: PRODUCTION TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used for crop production that influence adaptation

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL FACTORS
entities.description: Genetic factors that influence the adaptation of a crop or cultivar

entities.name: PHYSICAL FACTORS
entities.description: Soil and climate factors that influence the adaptation of a crop or cultivar

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL FACTORS
entities.description: Management and socioeconomic factors that influence the adaptation of a crop or cultivar

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: A process or condition referring to actions changing to suit new circumstances or the state of adaptedness

entities.name: ADAPTEDNESS
entities.description: The performance of a genetic population in an environment or range of environments

entities.name: GENETIC POPULATION
entities.description: A group of organisms with shared genetic characteristics whose performance determines adaptedness

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The surroundings or conditions in which a genetic population performs

relationships.description: Used for the adaptation of crops in varied agroenvironments
The process or condition of a crop's suitability to its environment
The process or condition of a cultivar's suitability to its environment
Influence the adaptation of crops and cultivars
